# Blaine Heffron

> Charleston-based AI automation consultant building workflow automation, internal tools, custom operations dashboards, and technical software for teams stuck in manual work.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://blaineheffron.com/): AI automation consulting, workflow automation, custom ops dashboards, selected work, and contact.
- [Research](https://blaineheffron.com/research.html): Research background, physics publications, machine learning, and scientific computing.
- [Profile Card](https://blaineheffron.com/card/): Compact profile and contact page.
- [Workflow Automation Consultant](https://blaineheffron.com/workflow-automation-consultant/): Workflow automation consulting for manual handoffs, follow-up, approvals, and reporting.
- [Business Automation Consultant](https://blaineheffron.com/business-automation-consultant/): Practical automation for owner-led businesses.
- [AI Automation Consulting Charleston SC](https://blaineheffron.com/ai-automation-consulting-charleston-sc/): Local AI automation consulting for Charleston-area businesses.
- [Custom Operations Dashboard](https://blaineheffron.com/custom-operations-dashboard/): Custom dashboard development for owners who need one view of operational exceptions.
- [Business Automation Audit](https://blaineheffron.com/business-automation-audit/): Diagnostic workflow audit before buying or building automation.
- [Performance-Based Automation Pilot](https://blaineheffron.com/performance-based-automation-pilot/): Measurable pilot structure for workflows with a clear baseline.
- [Zapier vs Make vs n8n](https://blaineheffron.com/workflow-automation-tools-zapier-make-n8n/): Tool-selection guidance for small-business workflow automation.
- [Lead Follow-Up Automation](https://blaineheffron.com/lead-follow-up-automation/): Intake and follow-up automation for missed or stale leads.
- [CRM Automation Consultant](https://blaineheffron.com/crm-automation-consultant/): CRM cleanup, routing, reminders, and reporting workflows.
- [Technical AI Systems](https://blaineheffron.com/technical-ai-systems/): ML pipelines, research software, and technical AI systems.

## Services

- Workflow bottleneck audits.
- Measurable automation pilots.
- Custom operations dashboards.
- Internal tools and workflow integrations.
- Technical AI systems, ML pipelines, and research software.
